chunks.text:
Affordable Fence Company — Affordable fence installation and repair in Plano. Services:
- Wood fence installation
- Iron fence installation
- Chain link fencing
- Fence repair
- Gate installation
- Custom fencing

Contact Information:
- Phone: (972) 423-2222
- Email: jeff@affordablefencentx. com
- Address: 809 17th St, Plano, TX 75074
- Website: http://www. affordablefencentx. com/
- Service Area: Plano, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 4. 9 stars with 236 reviews.
